markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Calibration session between Arena and GrowthX to discuss the content creation workflow, image generation process, and publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sadira will create and schedule 10-12 articles per week on WordPress, with Paola reviewing 2 articles per day](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [PH will share personas/target audiences to help tailor content](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [PH demonstrated the image creation process using Midjourney and Figma, sharing the Figma file with Sadira for future use](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Discussed potentially increasing content volume for a separate community website in addition to Arena's site](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Sadira creates draft articles from AI output, edits them, adds metadata and publishes to WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Paola will review 2 published articles per day and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Articles will be scheduled evenly throughout the week, not all at once, for better frequency](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### Image Generation

  - [PH uses Midjourney to generate initial images based on article topics](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [He then enhances the images in Figma by adding text, adjusting composition etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Shared the Figma file with Sadira so she can follow the same process](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Airtable Management

  - [Discussed using the Airtable to track content refresh needs for specific pages/keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Personas and product categories still need to be filled out](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

### Increasing Content Volume

  - [PH proposed creating additional 8-10 articles per week for a separate community website](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [To avoid competing with Arena's site, the content would focus on community engagement tactics](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sadira to schedule articles evenly throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Paola to review 2 articles per day and provide consolidated feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [PH to share personas/target audience details with the team](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Discuss potential for increasing content volume for the separate community site](https://fathom.video/share/Ec8KKtj7VyBmFvEio_G3hdj-XsJ5CF9b?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
